assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that Regular channel clusters will have 'Control plane + node pools automatically upgraded to 1.31 (next supported minor version)' when 1.30 reaches EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states that Extended channel clusters continue to have '1.30 remains supported until end of extended support period (up to 24 months from original release)' with no forced upgrade at standard EoS date

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response specifically states for No Channel clusters that 'Control plane: Auto-upgraded to 1.31 at EoS' and 'Node pools: Force-upgraded even if auto-upgrade is disabled'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions that Regular channel clusters 'Can be deferred: Apply "no upgrades" maintenance exclusion for up to 30 days past EoS' and No Channel clusters have 'Only 30-day "no upgrades" exclusion can defer temporarily'

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response provides 'Option 1: Proactive Manual Upgrade (All clusters)' with timeline 'Initiate upgrades before EoS enforcement' and includes detailed upgrade commands and action plan

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Cloud Logging notifications for EoS as a planning tool

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the deprecation insights dashboard for API compatibility checking

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly warn against 'snowflaking' or manually freezing versions, nor does it mention the security and reliability risks of this practice
